mapper.select: SELECT id, assignment_group_id, game_no, player_name, team FROM assignment_team_history WHERE assignment_group_id = #{assignmentGroupId} AND game_no IN ( SELECT game_no FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT game_no FROM assignment_team_history WHERE assignment_group_id = #{assignmentGroupId} ORDER BY game_no DESC LIMIT #{recentGameCount} ) recent_games ) ORDER BY game_no DESC, id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO assignment_team_history ( assignment_group_id, game_no, player_name, team, created_at ) VALUES
( #{assignmentGroupId}, #{gameNo}, #{p.playerName}, #{p.team}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM assignment_team_history WHERE created_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 day'
